evidenceBoundary.summary: This trace records observable repository work and CI remediation for PR #276. It does not include private chain-of-thought.

operatingModel.branchPolicy: feature/ branches require audit trace artefacts under docs/agent-audit/reasoning/YYYY/MM/DD.

workSummary: Expanded GitHub Diamond examples and fixtures from placeholder-style records into realistic synthetic evidence.
Expanded API payloads, performance inputs and performance-result examples while preserving adapter and validator-critical fields.
Opened draft PR #276 from feature/github-examples-293 to main.
Investigated failing CI on PR #276 and identified missing trace coverage plus a missing validation-report section.
Restored the required ## Evaluation coverage section in the GitHub bundle validation report.
Added this audit trace so branch-driven trace coverage can pass for 2026-05-22.

ciFindings.finding: Trace coverage failed because docs/agent-audit/reasoning/2026/05/22 did not exist for the feature branch.
Unit test 'today's trace directory passes coverage check' failed with missing-dir for docs/agent-audit/reasoning/2026/05/22.
Unit test 'validation reports use the standard section structure' failed because the GitHub bundle report used ## Example coverage instead of ## Evaluation coverage.

readFromCi: CI Node unit logs showed 153 passing tests and two failures before remediation.
Validate ResearchOps reported missing trace artefacts for 2026-05-22.
notRunLocally: No local npm, Python or release-gate validation was run in the connector-only environment.

risks.risk: The branch remains large and CI may surface further fixture or schema issues after this trace and validation-report fix.
risks.mitigation: Keep PR in draft until all checks pass or remaining failures are reviewed and remediated.

risks.risk: Release Gate failure details may include additional bundle-level validation errors beyond the first two CI blockers.
risks.mitigation: Re-inspect Release Gate logs after the new commits trigger CI.
